data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Spotify uses a microservices-based architecture allowing independent scaling and deployment of services.
data.technical_spec: Consists of numerous small, interconnected services deployed using Kubernetes.

data.title: Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: The platform leverages cloud computing resources to ensure scalability and reliability.
data.technical_spec: Primarily hosted on Google Cloud Platform for its global reach and scalability.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: CDNs are employed to distribute music content efficiently across different regions.
data.technical_spec: Uses a network of servers located around the world to cache content close to users.

data.title: Data Streaming Pipeline
data.description: Processes large volumes of data in real-time for personalized experiences.
data.technical_spec: Built on Apache Kafka for high-throughput data streaming and processing.

data.title: APIs & Integration
data.description: Robust API ecosystem enables third-party integrations and platform extensibility.
data.technical_spec: RESTful APIs conforming to standard HTTP methods for easy integration.
